description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 첨단 기술 사이의 공생 관계를 탐구하며, 가상 생태계 내에서 데이터와 빛으로 고동치는 식물의 모습을 보여줍니다.
description.en: An exploration of the symbiotic relationship between organic botany and advanced technology, where flora pulsates with data and light within a virtual ecosystem.

prompt: A macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, a futuristic digital plant with translucent crystalline petals and glowing fiber-optic veins. Soft pulses of neon cyan and ultraviolet light flow through the stems. The background is a fusion of organic moss and floating data fragments. Hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, digital nature aesthetic, intricate circuit patterns on leaves.
